workflow.name: Sync Gmail sent email contacts with Odoo mailing lists
workflow.description:
# Email Contacts Sync from Sent Mailbox to Odoo
This workflow automatically extracts recipient email addresses from previously sent emails, validates and cleans the data, and synchronizes only deliverable contacts into the internal Odoo Mailing List. It also monitors replies and bounce signals to support follow-up and engagement tracking.
## 📌Who is this for?
- Marketing team (Email campaigns)
- CRM / Odoo administrators
- Sales team (follow-up & customer engagement)
- Operations / Automation engineers (n8n workflows)

## 📌The problem
- Customer emails are scattered across sent mail history instead of a centralized list.
- Manually copying recipients into Odoo is slow and error-prone.
- Sent emails may include invalid or bounced addresses.
- Duplicate contacts appear frequently.
- Hard to know which recipients have replied or not for follow-up.


This leads to:
- messy contact database
- high bounce rate
- missed follow-ups
- inefficient manual work

## 📌How it works
- The system calculates the target date and queries the Gmail API to retrieve emails sent within the last X days.
- For each sent email:
         - Extract recipients from the To/Cc fields
         - Normalize data (trim, lowercase, remove duplicates)
         - Check the email thread to detect replies or bounce/system responses

- Each recipient is then classified into one of the following lists:
         - deliverableEmails
         - repliedEmails
         - bounceEmails
         - autoReplies
         - noResponse

- Push the list of deliverable emails to the internal Odoo system as Mailing List Contacts.
- Add emails from the bounce list to Blacklisted Email Addresses in Odoo to prevent future sending.
- (Optional) Log all processing results into Google Sheets for tracking and auditing.

## 📌Quick setup
Required information:
- N8n Version 2.4.6
- Gmail OAuth2 API
- Odoo API-KEY


Google Sheets will be used to log all notified events.

## 📌Results
- Automatically build contact list from real sent emails
- No manual data entry
- Only valid emails stored in Odoo
- Reduced bounce rate
- No duplicates
- Easy follow-up tracking
- Better CRM hygiene and campaign performance

## 📌Take it further
- Auto follow-up if no reply after X days
- Auto-remove hard bounces
- Engagement scoring
- Reply analytics dashboard
- Sync with Loyalty/CRM systems
- Scheduled daily sync

## 📌Need help customizing?
Contact me for consulting and support:
[Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/company/bac-ha-software/posts/?feedView=all) / [Website](https://bachasoftware.com/bhsoft-contacts)

parameters.content:
## 2. Loop Over the list of emails sent 10 days ago.
- We can customize the number of days in "Step 2: Set Variables" using the days_ago field.
- Each iteration checks if anyone has responded to the sent emails. After obtaining the results, they are categorized into lists: deliverableEmails, repliedEmails, bounceEmails, autoReplies, and noResponse.
- After each iteration, the data is merged into the lists above.

# Email Contacts Sync from Sent Mailbox to Odoo
This workflow automatically extracts recipient email addresses from previously sent emails, validates and cleans the data, and synchronizes only deliverable contacts into the internal Odoo Mailing List. It also monitors replies and bounce signals to support follow-up and engagement tracking.
## 📌Who is this for?

## 📌The problem

This leads to:

## 📌How it works

- For each sent email:
         - Extract recipients from the To/Cc fields

         - Check the email thread to detect replies or bounce/system responses

         - deliverableEmails

- Add emails from the bounce list to Blacklisted Email Addresses in Odoo to prevent future sending.
- (Optional) Log all processing results into Google Sheets for tracking and auditing.

## 📌Quick setup

Google Sheets will be used to log all notified events.

## 📌Results

Contact me for consulting and support:
[Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/company/bac-ha-software/posts/?feedView=all) / [Website](https://bachasoftware.com/bhsoft-contacts)

## 1. Set Variables and Get datetime
- Set Variables and Get datetime
- Get the list of emails sent 10 days ago.
- In Step 6, Split Out is used to split the "messages" array into multiple individual items.

## 3. Push the list of deliverable emails to the internal Odoo system.
- For each email in the deliverable emails list, we check if it exists in the internal Odoo system.
- If not, create a new contact and tag it as "020.Good-to-send".
- If yes, ensure it is assigned to "020.Good-to-send" and update when needed.

## 4. Add emails from the bounce email list to the "Blacklisted Email Addresses" in the internal Odoo system.
- For each email in the bounce email list, we check if it exists in the internal Odoo system.
- If not, create a new contact in the "Blacklisted Email Addresses" and tag it as "bounced".
- If yes, ensure it is assigned to "bounced" and update when needed.

## 5. Same.....Add emails from the bounce email list to the "Blacklisted Email Addresses" in the internal Odoo system.
- For each email in the bounce email list, we check if it exists in the internal Odoo system.
- If not, create a new contact in the "Blacklisted Email Addresses" and tag it as "bounced".
- If yes, ensure it is assigned to "bounced" and update when needed.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
